productDisplayName: Puma Men Team Essential Polo Navy Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Navy blue polo neck T-shirt made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, ribbed collar, buttoned placket branding on left chest and a vented hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This t-shirt from puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This stylish piece is an off-duty must have, pair it with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
